JOBS_PROVIDER.description: Job queue provider. Use 'asynq' for Go runtime, 'bullmq' for Bun runtime.

JOBS_CONCURRENCY.description: Number of jobs to process concurrently per worker. Default: 10.

JOBS_DEFAULT_QUEUE.description: Name of the default queue. Default: 'default'.

JOBS_MAX_RETRIES.description: Maximum number of retry attempts for failed jobs. Default: 3.

notes: REDIS_URL from the cache module is reused as the queue backend — no separate Redis needed.
